prompt: The bounce strategy analysis cron ran for 132 seconds but produced no useful output. The summary says the analysis was 'still running' when captured. Session transcript is at /tmp/strategy-test2.jsonl. What went wrong?

assertions.text: Identifies E3 pattern: sleep commands started but never blocked on (fire-and-forget)
Notes all 12 process poll calls use timeout=1000ms which is too short
Uses parse_session.py script from skill bundle (not ad-hoc parsing)
Recommends replacing tmux with claude -p mode OR combining sleep into SSH commands
Classifies as execution failure (E3), not business failure
